title: Mutton Kolhapuri
description: A hot lamb curry from Maharashtra made with roasted local spices, coconut and chilli.
steps: Stir-fry all the whole spices, ground star anise and desiccated coconut lightly on a tawa or in a dry frying pan for about 1 minute, or until roasted, then transfer to a spice grinder and process until ground.
Heat the oil in a large, heavy-based pan over medium heat, add the onions and stir-fry for about 4 minutes, or until light brown.
Add the ginger paste and garlic paste and fry well for about 2 minutes.
Add the lamb to the pan and fry for about 5 minutes.
Add the chilli powder, turmeric and chopped tomatoes and season with salt. Fry for about 5 minutes.
Add all the ground spices and 250 ml water. Reduce the heat, cover and cook for about 90 minutes, or until the meat is tender.
Serve hot garnished with chopped coriander.
